hero.headline: Built Right.
hero.description: Custom homes, renovations, and commercial construction for Erath County and beyond. From your first sketch to your final walkthrough — we build it like it's our own.

services.headline: Full-Service Construction
services.subhead: From raw land to finished home — we handle every phase with transparency and craftsmanship.

items.title: Custom Homes
items.description: Ground-up custom builds designed around your land, your budget, and your lifestyle.

items.title: Barndominiums
items.description: The Texas dream build. Metal exterior, custom interior, endless possibilities.

items.title: Renovations
items.description: Kitchen remodels, additions, porch builds, and whole-home renovations.

items.title: Commercial
items.description: Retail buildouts, office spaces, and agricultural buildings for growing businesses.

items.title: Outdoor Living
items.description: Covered patios, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and pergolas for the Texas lifestyle.

items.title: Design & Planning
items.description: We work with architects and designers — or bring your own plans. Either way.

about.headline: Local. Honest. Yours.
about.body: We've been building in Erath County since 2010. Local roots, local crew, local accountability. When we shake your hand on a project, we're shaking on it with our reputation in this community.

gallery.headline: Built Across Erath County
gallery.subhead: A selection of recent work in and around Stephenville.

items.title: Commercial Buildout
items.subtitle: Retail space on S. Graham St

items.quote: From the first meeting to the day we moved in, they made us feel like we were their only client. The craftsmanship is incredible.
items.author: The Martinez Family

items.quote: Honest, on time, and on budget. They told me what to expect and that's exactly what happened. Can't ask for more than that.
items.author: James R.

items.quote: We've used them twice now — once for a build and once for a remodel. Same quality both times. They have a customer for life.
items.author: Linda & Tom M.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtext: Free consultations on every project. Call us or send a message — we'll come out, listen to what you have in mind, and give you a straight answer.

contact.successMessage: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please call us instead.
